welcome.subject: You're in! You'll get my daily Splash Plays 1 hour before tip
welcome.preheader: Welcome to Splash Play. Here's what to expect.
welcome.body:
Welcome {firstName}.

You just signed up for **{sportsUpper}** daily picks from Splash Play. Here's the deal:

- **1 hour before tip-off**, I'll email my top 5 projections plus the player that my 100,000 contest sims have with the highest win rate on across DK + FD.
- That's all you'll get from me besides the occasional site update or deal offer, no spam or other nonsense.
- Want the full customizable sims, MLB, NBA, and NFL data, and Stokastic exports? There's a lot more insights to be had. [See plans →]({joinUrl})

While you wait for the next slate, two things worth bookmarking:

→ [Watch my latest streams on YouTube]({ytUrl})
→ [Join the Discord, if you've got a YouTube or SplashPlayPodast.com membership]({discordInvite})

— Chris Spags @ Splash Play

flows.name: Lead: how the sim works
flows.subject: How the sim actually works
flows.body:
Quick behind-the-scenes look at what you get from SplashPlayPodcast.com.

The Splash Play Monte Carlo sim runs up to 100K contest simulations. For each one:

- Every player's score is pulled from a **Box-Muller normal distribution** around their projection, with position-specific volatility. You get my projections underpinning the sim by default BUT can edit them to fade the chalk or see how a boosted projection impacts your favorite player if you're a VIP member.
- A **game environment multiplier** (0.85-1.15) and **team bias** (0.95-1.05) shift correlated players together.
- A fully sized contest field is built via **iterative proportional fitting** to match projected ownership.
- The 5,000 top projected lineups along 1,500 strategic pivots get ranked vs this projected field with contest settings from REAL tournaments, payouts get applied, duplicate dilution gets factored in.

End result: a win-rate, cash-rate, and ROI you can actually trust with more sims behind them than any other product in the industry. Pair them with your hand build or another lineup builder or sims tool for maximum results! [See for yourself →]({joinUrl})

— Spags

flows.name: Lead: How Splash Play members win more
flows.subject: How Splash Play members win more
flows.body:
A lot of what I built with SplashPlayPodcast.com was stuff I wanted to use myself to help make my efforts to build lineups and get in good bets (and best ball teams in offseason NFL) more easily and with more EV behind them.

What I've been surprised by most is what other people do to find success on a given slate.

The Projection Matrix is something I use for handbuilds or selecting a core of players because there's no easier way to see the data flattened out. Projections, sim win rates, minutes, and Fantasy Points Per Minute in one place. That's part of why I made it for Squirt Squad and VIP tier.

But the big one that guys use and get the best results with? The Sims tab. You still get the gist with Sim win rates on the Matchups and Matrix tabs but a lot of guys have used the 30+, 40+, 50+, and 60+ columns along with the 5x and 6x percentages to dial in lineups and identify low-owned players in ways I never thought possible.

With that plus people exporting my SPAGS projections to a Stokastic sim, there's been a lot of success for the community even on slates where I've gotten smoked. Which is humbling! But a sign things work.

[See the tools and data →]({joinUrl})

— Spags

These automations aren't going to go on forever (good news for both of us since I'm tired of editing them).

If you're on the fence, the sim + Discord combo is what most new members say made signing up to SplashPlayPodcast.com worth it. Use the code WELCOME10 for 10% off. [Here's the join page]({joinUrl}).

Sign up, give it a shot. If there's things I can tweak or build to make your life better when you sign up, let me know. Either way, you'll still get the free daily slate emails 1hr before tip and you are free of this sales automation.

— Spags

flows.name: Onboarding: quickstart
flows.subject: Thanks for joining Splash Play - Here's what you need to know
flows.body:
You're in! Thanks for signing up and supporting Splash Play.

A few things to knock out in the next 10 minutes so you get value out of day 1:

- **Join the Discord** → Your membership grants you access to the Splash Play Discord. You can see the latest projection updates whenever I push data for any sport along with key info and banter with the community: https://splashplaypodcast.com/discord/
- **Bookmark your tool** → [NBA]({siteUrl}/nba) · [NFL]({siteUrl}/nfl) · [MLB]({siteUrl}/mlb)
- **Watch my latest streams** → [YouTube]({ytUrl})
- You can **upgrade**, downgrade, or cancel whenever you want at https://splashplaypodcast.com/account/

Reply to this email if anything's confusing. Stay tuned for a few more helpful emails this week to help you dive deeper on the site.

— Spags

flows.name: Onboarding: first sim
flows.subject: Run your first sim in under 3 minutes
flows.body:
Quick one.

If you haven't run a sim yet, here's the fastest path:

1. Open [the NBA tool]({siteUrl}/nba) or [the MLB tool]({siteUrl}/mlb).
2. When you click Sims, you'll see my pre-populated data off the last run.
3. You can edit any projection and re-run the sim locally for yourself. 
4. Click the GPP Settings button to choose any live DK contest for tonight's slate (FD users, choose one that approximates your field as best you can).
5. Click re-run Sim. Pick a 10K, 25K, 50K, or 100K simulation depending upon how fast you want it to be (more sims = more time required).
6. See how your changes impacted the slate across Sims, Matchups, and Projection Matrix tabs.

I recommend keeping the tab open as the sim runs to maximize the speed of your web workers. It'll go slightly faster on a Mac than a PC but it should be around 1 minute for a 100K sim for contests around 20k entries and under 30 seconds as you go down to 25K or less sims or smaller fields.

Keep your eyes peeled for a few more lovingly crafted email automations to come.

— Spags

flows.name: Onboarding: Best Ball
flows.subject: Late-swap is where the real edge lives
flows.body:
If you told me one tool of mine would win someone a million dollars this year, I think it's this one.

I love DFS deeply. I've had success and think the math is cleanest in prop betting. But best ball with massive prize pools and an entirely unfigured out space? That's where there's some real upside.

The Best Ball Champion tool is my proudest example of the kinds of things I want to build. There are cool best ball tools out there. I like Pat Kerrane and know his Sidekick has won people a lot of money. ETR acquired BestBallExplorer fast when they saw how cleanly that site laid out their data. BestBallOverlay does some cool combinatiorial ownership stuff.

But I think I can make one that does it all in one, faster, cleaner, easier. I made it an idiot proof install with a Javascript bookmarklet you just drag to your Bookmarks bar. No DevTools or Chrome extension installs.

I love a lot of the stuff I've built and have had one of my best DFS years in a while due to these various products and data points. But if I had to wager money on which product I've created would win people the most money relative to a current gambling subtype's products, it's this one.

[Open the Best Ball Champion tool →]({siteUrl}/nfl)

You get a version with data, ADP tracking, exposures, and latest news/tweets for Squirt Squad tier while the lightning fast pick sims are ONLY for VIP.

— Spags

flows.name: Onboarding: VIP features
flows.subject: VIP features you might be missing
flows.body:
You've been in a week and hopefully you like things. Here's a uick reminder of what unlocks on VIP:

- **Monte Carlo sims** — Customize projections and try different contest settings or sim sizes (from 10K-100K) to make it fully your own.
- **Stokastic export** — drop my projections into any Stokastic tool with one click.
- **SPAGS exports** — clean DK/FD CSVs and Copy/Paste of my projections and data, no manual cleanup, easy to use on any credible optimizer or sims tool.
- **Best Ball Champion** — the Squirt Squad version is cool but the real-time sims are where the money is likely to be made this year.

I keep building new things in the hopes of providing adequate value to you guys, no matter what level. But if the ROI math works for you, [upgrade to VIP →]({joinUrl}).

— Spags

flows.name: Winback: 50% off
flows.subject: 50% off your first month back
flows.body:
I saw you canceled. Now that the tears have subsided, I'm here in your inbox with a boombox to try to win you back.

If it was a money thing, I'll knock **50% off your first month back** with code **STAY**.

[One-click resubscribe, 50% off any package with code STAY →]({joinUrl})

If it was something else — reply and tell me what's missing. I read every one. I keep building and improving things in the hopes that there's always more and more value being added to the Splash Play communtiy and SplashPlayPodcast.com site itself. Your feedback can help me make it better.

— Spags

flows.name: Winback: One more try
flows.subject: Have you won more without SplashPlayPodcast.com?
flows.body:
You've had a couple weeks since being a member. I get that any betting or DFS venture can be a constant battle of rolling a boulder uphill. But is it going better without the data at SplashPlayPodcast.com?

If it isn't, I'm here to throw you one more lifeline. Get 50% off now and come back. I constantly add new features and make improvements to ensure the experience is always improving and not stagnant. 

[One-click resubscribe, 50% off any package with code STAY →]({joinUrl})

If you sign up again and there are things you want to see, reply to this email and let me know. Or hop into the Discord  and drop something in the #premium-chat.

If you're doing better without SplashPlayPodcast.com or just tapped out on DFS and betting for now, no worries. This is the last automation email you'll get post-churn (though I may send you the occasional deal down the line that goes to everyone who's been a member or free signup).

Thanks for supporting previously, see you soon perhaps! 

— Spags
